home.title: Welcome!
home.name: Shaders
home.disc: This is the Project's Main Page

project1.name: 3D Geometry
project1.disc: Vertex Geometry — mesh deformation and real-time shape manipulation module driven by shader nodes

project2.name: Pixels
project2.disc: Fragment Engine — pixel processing lab focused on custom noises, procedural palettes, and post-effects

project3.name: 3D Physics
project3.disc: GPGPU Compute — high-performance simulation where thousands of objects calculate their own physics

project4.name: 3D Math
project4.disc: Raymarching SDF — generation of complex three-dimensional worlds using mathematical distance functions

project5.name: Instancing
project5.disc: TSL Instancing — rendering of thousands of copies with positions and colors computed by math nodes

about.title: Shaders
about.more02: ⚡ Shaders is a research platform for exploring the capabilities of modern GPU graphics, shaders, and parallel computing with WebGPU. 🎨
about.more03: 🧠 Each module explores a distinct area—from Vertex and Fragment Shaders to GPGPU, Raymarching, and TSL Instancing—gradually revealing the architecture of the modern graphics pipeline. 🔧
about.more04: 🚀 The project showcases technologies that form the foundation of high-performance interactive web applications and can be used to build next-generation commercial graphics systems. 🌐
